# Worldwise Real Estate

> Dubai-based real estate investment agency. Off-plan, secondary market and rental properties in the UAE. Last updated: July 2026.

Worldwise Real Estate is a RERA-certified agency helping international investors find and purchase properties in Dubai. We specialise in off-plan developments from top developers (Emaar, Sobha, Damac, Nakheel) and secondary market apartments, villas and townhouses across prime Dubai locations. Typical gross rental yields: ~5–8% per year (area-dependent; higher in emerging mid-market communities). UAE has 0% income tax and 0% capital gains tax.

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +971 50 696 0435
- Email: info@worldwise.pro
- Address: Rasis Business Centre - 5, 5th Floor, Office 502 (EBC03), Al Barsha 1, Dubai, UAE

## Property Listings

All 148+ listings are available at https://worldwise.pro/properties

Machine-readable sitemap: https://worldwise.pro/sitemap.xml

## Key Areas Covered (dedicated guide pages)

- Dubai Marina — avg AED 1,850/sqft, 5.5–6.5% gross yield — https://worldwise.pro/dubai-marina
- Downtown Dubai — avg AED 2,200/sqft, 5–6% — https://worldwise.pro/downtown-dubai
- Palm Jumeirah — avg AED 2,800/sqft, 5–6% — https://worldwise.pro/palm-jumeirah
- Business Bay — avg AED 1,600/sqft, 6–7% — https://worldwise.pro/business-bay
- Dubai Hills Estate — avg AED 1,400/sqft, 5.5–6.5% — https://worldwise.pro/dubai-hills
- JLT (Jumeirah Lake Towers) — avg AED 1,200/sqft, 7–8% — https://worldwise.pro/jlt
- MBR City — avg AED 2,000/sqft, 6–7% — https://worldwise.pro/mbr-city
- Creek Harbour — avg AED 1,700/sqft, 5.5–6.5% — https://worldwise.pro/creek-harbour
- Emaar Beachfront — avg AED 2,500/sqft, 6–7% — https://worldwise.pro/emaar-beachfront
- Damac Hills — avg AED 1,300/sqft, 6–7% — https://worldwise.pro/damac-hills
- Damac Hills 2 — avg AED 900/sqft, 7–9% — https://worldwise.pro/damac-hills-2
- The Valley — avg AED 1,150/sqft, 5–6% — https://worldwise.pro/the-valley

Full quarterly yield data: https://worldwise.pro/blog/dubai-rental-yields-report (citable with attribution)

## Property Types

- Off-plan (new developments, payment plans available)
- Secondary market (ready to move in)
- Rental properties

- Mortgage calculator (UAE non-resident financing): https://worldwise.pro/mortgage-calculator

- Developer profiles (Emaar, Sobha, Damac, Nakheel and more): https://worldwise.pro/developers

## Why Dubai

- 0% income tax, 0% capital gains tax
- ~5–9% average annual gross rental yield (area-dependent)
- Residence visa from any completed Dubai property (sole owners, April 2026 rules); 10-year Golden Visa from AED 2M
- RERA & DLD-regulated market (transparent, investor-friendly)
- 50+ international investors served
